description: A fast 4-minute round of 15 thrusters and 15 chest-to-bar pull-ups — the shortest time cap in this collection.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/open/2013/5 (official CrossFit Games Open workout), retrieved 2026-07-09; continuous 15/15 couplet; the 4-minute cap extends to 8 minutes if 90 total reps are completed, to 12 minutes at 180 reps, and to 16 minutes at 270 reps
